2604.26422.title: STLGT: A Scalable Trace-Based Linear Graph Transformer for Tail Latency Prediction in Microservices
2604.26422.paper_summary: Accurate end-to-end tail-latency forecasting is critical for proactive SLO management in microservice systems. However, modeling long-range dependency propagation and non-stationary, bursty workloads while maintaining inference efficiency at scale remains challenging. We present STLGT (Scalable Trace-based Linear Graph Transformer), a per-API predictor that encodes traces as span graphs for multi-step p95 tail-latency forecasting. STLGT uses a structure-aware linear graph Transformer to propagate cross-service dependencies with inference time linear in span graph size, and a decoupled temporal module to capture workload dynamics. Across a personalized education microservice application, DeathStarBench, and Alibaba traces, STLGT improves forecasting accuracy over PERT-GNN by 8.5% MAPE on average and achieves up to 12x faster CPU inference at N=32, matching the maximum span graph size after preprocessing the Alibaba traces. Ablation studies further demonstrate the effectiveness of each component, especially under bursty traffic.
2604.26422.paper_summary_zh: 準確的端到端尾延遲預測對於微服務系統中的主動 SLO 管理至關重要。<lb/>然而，在保持推理效率的同時，建模長期依賴傳播和非平穩、突發的工作負載仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>我們提出了 STLGT（可擴展的基於追蹤的線性圖Transformer），這是一個每個 API 的預測器，將追蹤編碼為跨度圖，以進行多步驟的 p95 尾延遲預測。<lb/>STLGT 使用結構感知的線性圖Transformer以線性推理時間在跨度圖大小上傳播跨服務依賴，並使用解耦的時間模塊來捕捉工作負載動態。<lb/>在個性化教育微服務應用、DeathStarBench 和阿里巴巴追蹤中，STLGT 在預測準確性上平均比 PERT-GNN 提高了 8.5% 的 MAPE，並在 N=32 時達到最高 12 倍的 CPU 推理速度，這與對阿里巴巴追蹤進行預處理後的最大跨度圖大小相匹配。<lb/>消融研究進一步證明了每個組件的有效性，特別是在突發流量下。
2604.26422.author: Yongliang Ding et.al.
2604.26422.authors: Yongliang Ding, Qigong Bi, Peng Pu
